headline: Deploy v4 — it beats the incumbent on every metric that matters.
recommendation_html: Use the local distilled scorer, v4. Judged against the intended editorial line (held-out DeepSeek labels), v4 beats the deployed v2 on recall, precision, F1, ranking, and error — with far higher precision (0.85 vs 0.61: v2 over-surfaces). It also fixes the multilingual recall bug (21.6%→0%) and adds delivered-protection scope (#70). One-time teaching cost was $4.81; scoring is local and free forever.
closing: The teaching cost is already spent. Every article from here is free, private, fast, and tuned to exactly the conservative editorial line we chose — and this version is measurably better than what's in production. That is the case for using this scorer, and for shipping v4.
